query:
-- Get the new character ID for job 540002
SELECT id, name, isLocked, masterPortraitUrl, lockedDescription FROM videoCharacters WHERE jobId = 540002;

rows.name: Zara
rows.lockedDescription: Woman in her late 20s, mixed-race (Black and White), warm medium skin tone. Her hair is long, dark brown, styled in loose, voluminous waves, falling past her shoulders. She has striking dark brown eyes with an almond shape. She has a lean, athletic build, appearing around 5'7" tall. She consistently wears a signature black leather jacket, layered over a dark top, paired with distressed dark skinny jeans and black ankle boots. She accessorizes with prominent gold hoop earrings and several gold necklaces.

She has striking dark brown eyes with an almond shape. She has a lean, athletic build, appearing around 5'7" tall. She consistently wears a signature black leather jacket, layered over a dark top, paired with distressed dark skinny jeans and black ankle boots. She accessorizes with prominent gold hoop earrings and several gold necklaces.
